From: Bulk - Marcons - Marcons Group <bulk@marconsgroup.com> 
Sent: 18 November 2025 07:11
To: Marcons Bulk Chartering <bulk@marconsgroup.com>
Subject: MV PROFOUND STAR / 24262 DWT/ KLANG, MALAYSIA/ 24-27 NOV
 
DEAR CHARTERING DESK / MARCONS GROUP
GOOD DAY 
 
PLEASED TO HEAR SUITABLE CARGO/ORDER FOR BELOW CANDIDATE
 
MV. PROFOUND STAR   DWT 24262   
-- OPEN  AT KLANG MALAYSIA 24-27 DEC
-- TRADE W/I RED SEA/EAST AFRICAN/PG/FAR EAST RANGE, CLASS 9, BOD ABT
400MT/80MT WOG 
 
BULK CARRIER, SINGLE DECKER, 4H/4H
BLT JAN/2011 IN CHINA, CLASS RINA, HONGKONG FLAG
DWT 24262MT ON 10.4M SSW
LOA/BM/DEPTH: 159.9/24.4/14.20M, GRT 15599/NRT 8183
CAPA ABT 29039 CBM2025-09-22
HATCHCOVER: FOLDING TYPE, HATCH SIZE NO.1-4 19x16M
CRANE 3x25MT
 
CONSUMPTION:
LSFO 180CST ABT 13MT/DAY+ MGO ABT 1.2MT/DAY, SPD ABT 10.5KT
MGO ABT 1.2MT/DAY IDLE AT PORT
MGO ABT 2.0MT/DAY FOR VSL'S CRANE OPERATION
 
ALL SPEED AND ALL CONSUMPTION FIGURES ARE TO BE CONSIDERED AS "ABOUT". ALL
ABOVE SPEED/CONSUMPTIONS ARE GIVEN FROM BEGINNING TO END OF SEA PASSAGE, AT
OPEN SEA, EVEN KEEL, NOT EXCEEDING SUMMER DRAFT, UNDER GOOD WEATHER
CONDITION NAMELY, 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS (FROM NOON TO NOON), NO ADVERSE
CURRENT, NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL, BEAUFORT SCALE MAX 4, DOUGLAS SEA
STATE 3 (MEANS SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT LESS THAN 1.25 METRES), FAVORABLE
CURRENT FACTOR NOT TO BE TAKEN INTO ACCOUNT WHILE EVLUATING VESSEL
PERFORMANCE, EXTRAPOLATION OF "GOOD WEATHER" PERFORMANCE FOR "BAD WEATHER"
PERIODS IS NOT ALLOWED.
VSL TO HAVE LIBERTY OF USING DIESEL OIL WHEN START/STOP/SWITCH MAIN ENGINE
AT SEA, AND WHEN ENTERING/LEAVING PORT, MANEUVERING IN SHALLOW, NARROW OR
RESTRICTED WATERS.
VSL IS ALLOWED TO CONSUME EXTRA BUNKER WHEN CLEANING HOLDS/EXCHANGE
BALLASTING WATER.
CHARTERERS WARRANT TO SUPPLY BUNKERS TO VESSEL DURING THE CURRENCY OF THIS
CHARTER WITH SPECIFICATIONS NOT LOWER THAN IFO: 180 CST RMG 180 STANDARD AS
PER ISO 8217:2010 / MGO: DMA STANDARD AS PER ISO 8217:2005 AND ALSO TO
COMPLY WITH THE LATEST MARPOL 73/78 ALL AND RELEVANT INTERNATIONAL AND LOCAL
REGULATIONS AND ANY SUBSEQUENT AMENDMENTS.
CHARTERERS TO COMPLY WITH FUEL SULPHUR CONTENT AS PER THE REQUIREMENTS OF
MARPOL ANNEX VI. CHARTERERS TO ARRANGE LOW SUPLHUR IFO/MDO/MGO AT THEIR TIME
AND EXPENSES FOR CALLING ALL NORTH AMERICAN/EU PORTS.
 
A.D.A.
 
Thanks and Regards;
